---
title: "Dia Nayun"
role: intern
#projects: [hypomania]
image: "../images/dia.jpg"
# programme: [gambling]
# listing:
#    - id: badges
#      contents: "../badges_awarded/dia/*.jpg"
#      template: ../badges.ejs
#    - id : projects
#      contents: "../projects/*qmd"
#      type: default
#      include: 
#        people: [dia]
#      fields: [description, title,funder]
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
---

My name is Dia Nayun, and I am a final-year psychology undergraduate student. My ultimate goal is to become a Clinical Psychologist to help and support people become better versions of themselves, but through my time at Teesside University, I have also developed a strong interest in research within psychology. My primary research interests lie in and around cognition, memory and decision-making. 

During my 8-week internship with the lab, I would like to learn about and engage in the full process, start to finish, of how psychological research is conducted within a lab setting. I would also love the opportunity to be able to present an academic poster that details this process. 


<!-- ## Projects I have been involved in -->

<!-- ::: {#projects} -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- ## Research Training  -->

<!-- ::: {#badges} -->

<!-- ::: -->
